options.name: -layer
options.description: Specifies the layer to add trim metal.The layer name should be a routing layer which be defined in the LEF file.

options.name: -location
options.description: Specify proximate location of trimMetal, tool may adjust automatically to closest location which is best for the trimMetal

options.name: -mask
options.description: Specify the mask of trim metal

options.name: -snap_to_end
options.description: Specify to snap trimMetal to closest end of selected pin or wire
